title: Chicken Shawarma Spiced Rotisserie

seo.title: Rotisserie Chicken Shawarma: Authentic Middle Eastern Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Master the art of Rotisserie Chicken Shawarma with our easy-to-follow recipe. Get authentic Middle Eastern flavors right at home. Perfect for family dinners!
longTailKeywords: how to make Rotisserie Chicken Shawarma
authentic Middle Eastern Rotisserie Chicken Shawarma
Rotisserie Chicken Shawarma step by step
best Rotisserie Chicken Shawarma at home
h2Headings: Pro Tips for the Best Rotisserie Chicken Shawarma
Rotisserie Chicken Shawarma Variations and Substitutions
seo.imageAlt: Delicious Rotisserie Chicken Shawarma cooked to perfection with Middle Eastern spices, ready to serve.
seo.imageCaption: Savor the rich, aromatic flavors of homemade Rotisserie Chicken Shawarma, a Middle Eastern delight perfect for any meal.

description: Experience the incredible flavors of the Middle East right in your kitchen with this succulent Chicken Shawarma Spiced Rotisserie. A whole chicken is marinated in a vibrant blend of traditional spices and slow-roasted to perfection, delivering tender, aromatic meat with crispy skin. This recipe brings the authentic taste of street-side shawarma directly to your family table.

instructions.title: Prepare the Shawarma Marinade
instructions.text: In a large bowl, whisk together the olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, ground cumin, ground coriander, smoked paprika, ground turmeric, ground cinnamon, cayenne pepper, black pepper, and salt until well combined. This creates a rich, aromatic paste.

instructions.title: Prepare the Chicken
instructions.text: Pat the whole chicken dry thoroughly with paper towels. This helps the skin crisp up beautifully during roasting. Remove any giblets from the cavity. You can leave the skin on for maximum flavor and crispiness.

instructions.title: Marinate the Chicken
instructions.text: Rub the prepared marinade all over the chicken, making sure to get it into any crevices and under the skin if possible. For best results, place the chicken in a large Ziploc bag or covered dish and refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or preferably overnight, to allow the flavors to deeply penetrate the meat.

instructions.title: Set Up the Rotisserie
instructions.text: Preheat your grill or oven to medium-high heat, around 375F to 400F (190C to 200C), ensuring your rotisserie attachment is ready. Secure the marinated chicken onto the rotisserie spit, making sure it is balanced to ensure even cooking and rotation.

instructions.title: Cook on Rotisserie
instructions.text: Place the rotisserie spit with the chicken onto the rotisserie mechanism. Cook for approximately 1 hour 30 minutes to 2 hours, or until the internal temperature of the thickest part of the thigh reaches 165F (74C) and the juices run clear. The skin should be deeply golden brown and crispy. Adjust heat as needed to prevent burning.

instructions.title: Rest and Carve
instructions.text: Once cooked, carefully remove the chicken from the rotisserie spit. Transfer it to a cutting board and tent loosely with foil. Let the chicken rest for 10-15 minutes. This allows the juices to redistribute, resulting in a more tender and flavorful meat. Carve the chicken into thin slices, just like traditional shawarma.

instructions.title: Serve Your Shawarma
instructions.text: Serve the sliced chicken shawarma immediately. It is fantastic tucked into warm pita bread with fresh vegetables like tomatoes, cucumbers, and onions, drizzled with tahini sauce or garlic sauce. Enjoy this authentic taste of the Middle East!

tips: For an extra layer of flavor, consider adding a pinch of ground cloves or cardamom to the spice mix, which are classic Middle Eastern additions.
If you dont have a rotisserie, you can roast the chicken in a regular oven at 400F (200C) on a rack over a baking sheet, turning periodically, until cooked through.
Store leftover chicken tightly covered in the refrigerator for up to 3 days. Reheat gently in a pan or oven to maintain moisture.
article: Chicken Shawarma Spiced Rotisserie is a beloved Middle Eastern Chicken Recipes dish enjoyed across Middle Eastern. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
